page.title: Participle Clauses Basics
page.subtitle_html: Participle Clauses Basics — B2 participle clauses with -ing, V3, and reduced relative or adverbial meanings.
page.subtitle_text: B2 participle clauses with -ing, V3, and reduced relative or adverbial meanings.

blocks.body: {"level":"B2","intro":"Participle Clauses Basics: Participle clauses basics показує, як скорочувати relative and adverbial clauses with -ing or V3 forms.","rules":[{"label":"-ing clauses","text":"Use -ing clauses when the subject performs the action.","example":"Walking home, I saw an old friend."},{"label":"V3 clauses","text":"Use past participle clauses for passive meanings.","example":"Written in a hurry, the note was unclear."},{"label":"Same subject","text":"Keep the subject relationship clear to avoid ambiguity.","example":"Having finished the task, she left."}]}

blocks.heading: B2 focus
blocks.body: This compact page exists as the theory anchor for the Polyglot English B2 lesson package.
